name: ext-mcp-trust-os
description: OS-world trust adapters for TUF-lite and tlog monitoring (HTTP fetch + checkpoint state + monitor runner).
docs:
OS trust adapters.

- std.mcp.trust.os.fetch_bundle_v1

- std.mcp.trust.os.clock_v1
- std.mcp.trust.os.fetch_tuf_metadata_v1
- std.mcp.trust.os.fetch_witness_checkpoint_v1
- std.mcp.trust.os.state_store_fs_v1
- std.mcp.trust.tlog.os.http_client_v1
- std.mcp.trust.tlog.os.checkpoint_store_v1
- std.mcp.trust.tlog.os.monitor_runner_v1
